title: scandalida rubra
intro: Scandalida rubra, also known as Red Bristle Club Moss, is a type of lichen that belongs to the family Scandulaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Scandalida rubra include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Scandalida rubra can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
